# WhoStoodUp

> Tracking which celebrities and politicians have publicly commented on Sonam Wangchuk's hunger strike demanding Education Minister Dharmendra Pradhan's resignation.

## What this site is

A crowdsourced, statically-built tracker of public statements by notable Indian public figures on Sonam Wangchuk's indefinite hunger strike at Jantar Mantar, New Delhi (started 2026-06-28), demanding the resignation of Education Minister Dharmendra Pradhan over competitive exam paper leaks and student suicides.

All entries are contributed via GitHub Pull Request with mandatory verbatim quotes and public source links. Support and opposition are tracked with equal rigour. No unsourced claims, no paraphrasing.

## Machine-readable data

Full entries dataset: https://whostoodup.pages.dev/entries.json
Schema version field: `schema_version` (breaking changes bump this)
Format: JSON object with `generated_at` (ISO 8601 UTC) and `entries` array

## Entry schema

Each entry in the `entries` array:

| Field        | Type   | Values / Notes |
|--------------|--------|----------------|
| `name`       | string | Public figure's full name |
| `role`       | enum   | `celebrity` \| `politician` \| `influencer` \| `journalist` \| `other` |
| `wiki_url`   | string | Wikipedia or public profile URL (optional) |
| `stance`     | enum   | `support` \| `opposition` \| `neutral` |
| `quote`      | string | Verbatim direct quote (optional — omit if visited but no public statement) |
| `timestamp`  | string | `YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM` in IST (UTC+5:30) |
| `source_url` | string | Publicly accessible URL, required |

## Neutrality

This is not an advocacy site. Support and opposition are tracked identically. Entries must reference what the person actually said — not editorial interpretation.

## Contributing

All writes via GitHub PR: https://github.com/alt-account-7/whostoodup
